history.text: A republic was declared, changing Micronesia's political system and state identity.
Compact of Free Association appears in Micronesia's historical record.

worthSeeing.title: Truk Lagoon (Chuuk):
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's top wreck dive sites, with 60+ WWII Japanese ships and aircraft.

worthSeeing.title: Nan Madol:
worthSeeing.text: Ancient megalithic city built on a reef lagoon, UNESCO World Heritage site.

worthSeeing.title: Pohnpei Waterfalls:
worthSeeing.text: Lush rainforest island with spectacular waterfalls and traditional sakau culture.
